isEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid BoardID, A.boardname BoardName, A.boardname2 BoardName2, A.treevieworder TreeViewOrder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.c_clubno C_ClubNo, A.gubun FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN (SELECT boardid, accessid, access_, tenant_id FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE RTRIM(parentboardid) = UPPER(#v_pRootBoardID#) AND access_ = 1 AND write_fg = 'TRUE' AND boardid <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND ( accessid = #v_pUserID# OR accessid = #v_pDeptID# OR accessid = #v_pCompanyID# OR accessid = 'EVERYONE') ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.treevieworder ASC
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid BoardID, A.boardname BoardName, A.boardname2 BoardName2, A.treevieworder TreeViewOrder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.c_clubno C_ClubNo, A.gubun FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN (SELECT boardid, accessid, access_, tenant_id FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE RTRIM(parentboardid) = #v_pRootBoardID# AND access_ = 1 AND boardid <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND ( accessid = #v_pUserID# OR accessid = #v_pDeptID# OR accessid = #v_pCompanyID# OR accessid = 'EVERYONE') ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.treevieworder ASC

select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid, A.boardname, A.boardname2, A.treevieworder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.c_clubno C_ClubNo, A.gubun FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A WHERE RTRIM(parentboardid) = #v_pRootBoardID# AND A.boardid <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.treevieworder ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT NO, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_BOARD WHERE Tenant_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY WRITEDAY DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE TITLE LIKE '%' ||#v_KEYWORD#|| '%' OR CONTENT LIKE '%' ||#v_KEYWORD#|| '%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE TITLE LIKE '%'||#v_KEYWORD#||'%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE '%'||#v_KEYWORD#||'%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: ORDER BY NO DESC
ORDER BY NO DESC

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: ORDER BY REF DESC, STEP ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT TITLE, STEP, RE_LEVEL, REF, CHARFILENAME, READNUM, WRITEDAY, USERNAME, USERNAME2, ID, NO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT TITLE, STEP, RE_LEVEL,REF, CHARFILENAME, READNUM, WRITEDAY, USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, ID, NO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE#

SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE#
SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ = #v_CLUBNAME# AND C_CATE_A = #v_C_CATE_A# AND C_CATE_B = #v_C_CATE_B# AND C_CATE_C = #v_C_CATE_C# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT C_Club.C_ClubNo, C_Club.C_RegDate, C_Club.C_ClubName, C_Club.C_ClubName2, C_CLUBGUBUN, C_CATE_A, C_CATE_B, C_CATE_C, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, C_SYSOPID, C_MEMBERCNT, C_LOGO, C_CLUBDESC, C_CLUBBANNER, COMPANYID, ISIN, T1.ITEMCNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB CROSS JOIN ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) ITEMCNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.BoardID = TBL_COMM_ITEM.BoardID AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_COMM_ITEM.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUB.C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.C_ClubGubun, A.C_clubConfirmtype, B.permit FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB A JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER B ON A.C_ClubNo = B.C_ClubNo JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO C ON A.C_ClubNo = C.C_ClubNo WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND RTRIM(B.C_ID) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.BoardID BoardID, B.BOARDNAME BOARDNAME, A.ItemID, A.WriterID, A.WriterName, A.WriterDeptName, A.WriterCompanyName, A.WriteDate, A.StartDate, A.ParentWriteDate, A.Importance, A.Title, A.Attachments, A.ReadCount, A.ItemLevel, A.Abstract FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A JOIN (SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_MYBOARDS WHERE USERID = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND P.GUBUN <> 3 WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.StartDate <= #v_pNow# AND A.EndDate > #v_pNow# AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.BoardID = A.BOARDID AND S.ItemID = A.ITEMID AND S.UserID = v_PUSERID AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) ORDER BY A.ParentWriteDate DESC, A.UpperItemIDTree, A.StartDate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pEndRow#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT A.BOARDID AS BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME AS BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_MYBOARDS WHERE USERID = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND P.GUBUN <> 3 WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND A.ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT USERID FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.USERID = #v_pUserID# ) ) AND ROWNUM >= #v_pEndRow# ORDER BY #v_pSortBy#

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.WRITERDEPTNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END READFLAG FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NVL(COUNT(USERID), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND StartDate < #v_pNow# AND EndDate > #v_pNow# ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, A.STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PENDROW#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME$v_strLang$, A.WRITERDEPTNAME$v_strLang$, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME$v_strLang$, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE D.TOTALCOUNT END READFLAG FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NVL(COUNT(USERID), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE RTRIM(USERID) = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow#
AND TITLE LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND WRITERNAME$v_strLang$ LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND ABSTRACT LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND STARTDATE > #v_pStartDate#
AND ENDDATE > #v_pEndDate#
ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, A.STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pEndRow#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.itemid, A.boardid, B.boardname$v_strLang$, A.writerid, A.writername$v_strLang$, A.writerdeptname$v_strLang$, A.writercompanyname$v_strLang$, A.parentwritedate, A.writedate, A.startdate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE D.totalcount END readflag FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT boardid, boardname$v_strLang$, tenant_id FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE boardid LIKE #v_pBoardID# ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NVL(COUNT(userid), 0) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.itemid = D.itemid AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE A.boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND enddate > #v_pNow#
AND title LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND writername$v_strLang$ LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND abstract LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND startdate > #v_pStartDate#
AND enddate > #v_pEndDate#
ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, TO_CHAR(A.upperitemidtree) DESC, A.startdate ASC ) WHERE rownum <= #v_pEndRow#

SELECT ItemID, WriterID, WriterName, WriterName2, WriterDeptName, WriterDeptName2, WriterCompanyName, WriterCompanyName2, WriteDate, ParentWriteDate, Importance, Title, ContentLocation, StartDate, EndDate, Abstract, Attachments, UpperItemIDTree, ItemLevel, copiedItem, ExtensionAttribute1, ExtensionAttribute2, ExtensionAttribute3, ExtensionAttribute32, ExtensionAttribute4, ExtensionAttribute5 FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE = #v_pParentWriteDate# AND UPPERITEMIDTREE LIKE #v_pUpperItemIDTree# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, STARTDATE ASC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE >= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND ITEMID <> #v_pItemID# AND UPPERITEMIDTREE NOT LIKE #v_pUpperItemIDTree# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND ITEMID <> #v_previousItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND ITEMID <> #v_pItemID# AND UPPERITEMIDTREE NOT LIKE #v_pUpperItemIDTree# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.ITEMID, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.IMPORTANCE, B.BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME$v_strLang$', A.ABSTRACT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME$v_strLang$, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.WRITERID = #v_pUserID# AND A.STARTDATE > #v_pNow#

SELECT REPLYID, USERNAME$v_userInfo_lang$, USERID, CONTENT, WRITEDATE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ONELINEREPLY WHERE BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND ITEMID = #v_pItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY WRITEDATE ASC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT UserID, UserName, UserName2, UserDeptName, UserDeptName2, UserCompanyName, UserCompanyName2, UserTitle, UserTitle2, ReadDate FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ReadDate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 50
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #v_pOrgItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pOrgBoardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND CONTENT LIKE '%' || #v_keyword# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_NO DESC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND USERNAME$v_userInfo_lang$ LIKE '%'|| #v_keyword# ||'%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_NO DESC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_NO DESC

sqlMap.select: SELECT ID, USERNAME$v_userInfo_lang$, C_NO, CONTENT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_NO) = #v_no# AND RTRIM(ID) = #v_userInfo_userID# AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_code# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_code# AND c_id LIKE '%'||#v_keyword# ||'%' AND permit IN (1,4) AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_visited DESC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO ON C_MEMBERINFO.userid = RTRIM(C_CLUBUSER.c_id) WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno) = #v_code# AND C_MEMBERINFO.username$v_userInfo_lang$ LIKE '%'||#v_keyword#||'%' AND C_CLUBUSER.permit IN (1,4) AND C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_CLUBUSER.c_visited DESC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_code# AND permit IN ( 1,4 ) AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_visited DESC

sqlMap.select: SELECT USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, EMAIL FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ userName FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_C_SYSOPID# AND companyid = #v_COMPANYID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_OUTAPPLICATION WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND RTRIM(userid) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT C_CLUB.c_clubname$v_userInfo_lang$ c_clubname, C_CLUB.c_sysopid, C_MEMBERINFO.email, C_MEMBERINFO.username FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB INNER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO ON TRIM(C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = C_MEMBERINFO.userid AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = C_MEMBERINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TRIM(C_CLUB.c_clubno) = #v_code# AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO WHERE userid = #v_RECORD_C_SYSOPID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_logo, c_clubbanner, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT boardname$v_LANG$ AS BOARDNAME, boardid FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND (showposition = ' ' OR showposition IS NULL) AND parentboardid != 'TOP' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT boardname$v_LANG$ AS BOARDNAME, boardid FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND showposition = '1' AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT boardname$v_LANG$ AS BOARDNAME, boardid FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND showposition = '2' AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.userid, A.outdate, A.outreason, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ userName FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_OUTAPPLICATION A INNER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO B ON A.userid = B.userid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT A.c_id, A.companyid, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER A INNER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_id) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND permit != 0 AND A.c_id LIKE '%' || #v_SER# || '%' AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT A.c_id, A.companyid, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER A INNER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_id) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND permit != 0 AND B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE '%' || #v_SER# || '%' AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT A.c_id, A.companyid, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER A INNER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_id) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND permit != 0 AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND RTRIM(c_id) = #v_C_ID# AND companyid = #v_COMPANYID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_clubgubun, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$, c_membercnt, c_clubconfirmtype FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO WHERE companyid = #v_USERINFO_COMPANYID# AND RTRIM(userid) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT A.c_id, A.companyid, A.c_indate, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER A INNER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_id) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND permit = '0' AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT C_NAME, C_CATE_A CATE, NVL(COUNT(C_CODE), 0) CNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY ON C_CLUB.C_Cate_a = C_CATEGORY.C_Code AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = C_CATEGORY.TENANT_ID WHERE C_CATE_A = #code# AND C_CATEGORY.C_Cat = #cat# AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY C_NAME, C_CATE_A
select.isNotEqual: SELECT C_NAME, C_CATE_B CATE, NVL(COUNT(C_CODE), 0) CNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY ON C_CLUB.C_Cate_b = C_CATEGORY.C_Code AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = C_CATEGORY.TENANT_ID WHERE C_CATE_B = #code# AND C_CATEGORY.C_Cat = #cat# AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY C_NAME, C_CATE_B

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUB.C_ClubNo, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_CLUBDESC, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, C_MEMBERCNT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_Club.C_ClubNo ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY ON C_CLUB.C_Cate_a = C_CATEGORY.C_Code AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = C_CATEGORY.TENANT_ID JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(C_Club.C_SysopID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE C_CATE_A = #code# AND C_CATEGORY.C_Cat = LOWER(#cat#) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_pStart# AND #v_pEnd#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_Club.C_ClubNo, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_CLUBDESC, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, C_MEMBERCNT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_Club.C_ClubNo ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY ON C_CLUB.C_Cate_b = C_CATEGORY.C_Code AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = C_CATEGORY.TENANT_ID JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(C_Club.C_SysopID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE C_CATE_B = #code# AND C_CATEGORY.C_Cat = LOWER(#cat#) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_pStart# AND #v_pEnd#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_MEMBERCNT, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_CLUBDESC, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T1.C_CLUBNO) AS ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB T1 JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(T1.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND T1.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE $v_searchName$ LIKE '%' || #v_searchValue# || '%' AND T1.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_pStart# AND #v_pEnd#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) AS COPCNT FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_MEMBERCNT, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_CLUBDESC, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T1.C_CLUBNO) AS ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB T1 JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(T1. C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND T1.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# WHERE $v_searchName$ LIKE '%' || #v_searchValue# || '%' AND T1.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.C_ClubGubun, A.C_clubConfirmtype , B.permit FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB A JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER B ON A.C_ClubNo = B.C_ClubNo AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO C ON A.C_ClubNo = C.C_ClubNo AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND RTRIM(B.C_ID) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.WRITERDEPTNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NVL(COUNT(USERID), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE RTRIM(USERID) = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, A.STARTDATE DESC, A.DOCNO DESC, TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC
ORDER BY #v_PSORTBY#
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PENDROW#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE >= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, STARTDATE DESC, DOCNO DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, STARTDATE DESC, DOCNO DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
SELECT C_ID, PERMIT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_STRNO# AND RTRIM(C_ID) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_SYSOPID, ISIN FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_PCLUBID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT C_CLUBUSER.C_ClubNo, C_CLUBUSER.permit, C_CLUBUSER.C_Visited, C_CLUB.C_ClubName, C_CLUB.C_ClubName2, C_CLUB.C_memberCnt, C_CLUB.C_SysopID, C_CLUB.C_ClubGubun, C_CLUB.C_clubConfirmtype, C_CLUB.C_Logo_Thumbnail FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB ON C_CLUBUSER.C_ClubNo = C_CLUB.C_ClubNo AND C_CLUBUSER.TENANT_ID = C_CLUB.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBUSER.C_ID) = #v_USERID# AND C_CLUB.C_adminConfirm = 'Y' AND PERMIT <> 0 AND C_CLUBUSER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_CLUBUSER.C_Visited DESC

SELECT NO, TITLE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
ORDER BY REF DESC,STEP ASC
ORDER BY REF DESC,STEP ASC
ORDER BY REF DESC,STEP ASC
ORDER BY NO DESC

SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, SHOWPOSITION, SN, GUBUN FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND SHOWPOSITION != ' ' ORDER BY SN, SHOWPOSITION

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.BoardID, ITEMID, TITLE, WRITEDATE, GUBUN, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.BoardID = TBL_COMM_ITEM.BoardID AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_COMM_ITEM.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_COMM_ITEM.BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# ORDER BY PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC, STARTDATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLMANAGER WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY POLLGROUPNO DESC
SELECT QUESTIONID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLQUESTION WHERE RTRIM(POLLMANAGERID) = #v_MANAGERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLMANAGER WHERE RTRIM(MANAGERID) = #v_POLLMANAGERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLQUESTION WHERE RTRIM(POLLMANAGERID) = #v_POLLMANAGERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLMANAGER WHERE RTRIM(MANAGERID) = #v_MANAGERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLQUESTION WHERE RTRIM(POLLMANAGERID) = #v_MANAGERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLRESPONSE WHERE QUESTIONID = #v_QUESTIONID# AND ANSWERETC IS NOT NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_CLUBGUBUN, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_SYSOPID, ISIN, COMPANYID, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_SYSOPID, ISIN, COMPANYID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_COMCLOSE WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT FILEPATH FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE ItemID = #v_pOrgItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, ITEMID, GUBUN, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITEDATE, TITLE, ITEMCNT, C_MEMBERCNT, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, A.BoardID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID CROSS JOIN (SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) ITEMCNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(A.C_ClubNo) = #v_copNo# AND A.ParentBoardID != 'TOP' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 CROSS JOIN (SELECT C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_MEMBERCNT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_copNo# AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T3 WHERE RTRIM(A.C_ClubNo) = #v_copNo# AND A.ParentBoardID != 'TOP' AND B.StartDate <= #v_pNow# AND B.EndDate > #v_pNow# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY B.WriteDate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM (SELECT (SUBSTR(C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, 1, 18)) AS C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBGUBUN, C_CLUBDESC, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_MEMBERCNT, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_MEMBERCNT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <=3

SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, C_CLUBNO, C_SYSOPID, C_CLUBGUBUN, C_CLUBDESC, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_MEMBERCNT, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE (C_REGDATE >= (TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') -30)) AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_CLUBNO DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <=3
SELECT C_SYSOPID, ISIN FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_SYSOPID, COMPANYID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY WHERE C_CAT = #cat# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY C_CODE, C_ORDER
SELECT ANSWERID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLANSWER WHERE POLLQUESTIONID = #v_QUESTIONID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT RTRIM(C_SYSOPID) FROM (SELECT C_SYSOPID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_CLUB.C_ClubNo DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ = #num#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(C_CLUB.C_SysopID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_CLUBDESC, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_MEMBERCNT, C_CATE_A, C_CATE_B, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_CLUB.C_ClubNo DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(C_CLUB.C_SysopID) = RTRIM(T2.CN) AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ = #num#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNAME2, C_CLUBDESC, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_MEMBERCNT, C_CATE_A, C_CATE_B, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, ' ' DISPLAYNAME, ' ' DISPLAYNAME2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_Club.C_ClubNo DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ = #num#

sqlMap.select: SELECT PERMIT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE TRIM(C_ID) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND TRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(AccessID), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE BoardAdmin_FG = 'TRUE' AND ( AccessID = #v_pUserID# OR AccessID = #v_pDeptID# OR AccessID = #v_pCompanyID# OR AccessID = 'everyone' ) AND BoardID = ( SELECT BoardGroupID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT Result FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_TREECACHE WHERE QUERY = #v_pRootBoardID# ||','|| #v_pUserID# ||','|| #v_pDeptID# ||','|| #v_pCompanyID# ||','|| #v_pMode# ||','|| #v_pSubFlag# ||','|| #v_pSelectBy# ||','|| #v_pExcludeBoardID# ||','|| #v_pClubNo# ||','|| #v_strLang# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT C_CLUBNOTICETITLE ONEVALUE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_CLUBBOARDTITLE ONEVALUE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_CLUBBOARD1TITLE ONEVALUE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_CLUBBOARD2TITLE ONEVALUE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_CLUBPDSTITLE ONEVALUE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT USERID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.AspAdmin WHERE USERID = #v_STRUSERID# AND Tenant_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT FileName FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE NO = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(MAX($v_MAXIDFIELDNAME$),0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE#

SELECT FILENAME FROM EZCOMMUNITY.$v_BNAME$ WHERE $v_MAXIDFIELDNAME$ = #v_STRMAXNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE#
SELECT COMPANYID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO WHERE COMPANYID = #v_USERINFO_COMPANYID# AND USERID = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(MAX(clubid), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_CLUBID WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(C_ID) = #v_PUSERID#
AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_PCLUBNO#
AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = (SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUB WHERE C_CLUBGUBUN = '2'
AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_PCLUBNO#
AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = (SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_LASTDATE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND RTRIM(C_ID) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(A.ItemID), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A JOIN (SELECT BoardID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_MYBOARDS WHERE RTRIM(UserID) = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON P.BoardID = B.BoardID AND P.Gubun <> 3 AND P.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE (NOT EXISTS (SELECT UserID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE RTRIM(UserID) = #v_pUserID# AND ItemID = A.ItemID AND ReadDate > (TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') -5)) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) AND A.StartDate < #v_pNow# AND A.StartDate > #v_pFromNow# AND A.EndDate > #v_pNow#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(ItemID), 0) TotalCount FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND StartDate < #v_pNow# AND EndDate > #v_pNow# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(A.ITEMID), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND STARTDATE <= #v_pNow# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND TITLE LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND WRITERNAME LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND ABSTRACT LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND STARTDATE > #v_pStartDate#
AND EndDate > #v_pEndDate#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(A.ITEMID), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM A WHERE A.BOARDID LIKE #v_pBoardID# AND ENDDATE > #v_pNow# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND TITLE LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND WRITERNAME LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND ABSTRACT LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND STARTDATE > #v_pStartDate#
AND EndDate > #v_pEndDate#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(ItemID), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE WriterID = #v_pUserID# AND StartDate > #v_pNow# AND TBL_COMM_ITEM.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT PASSWORD FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ONELINEREPLY WHERE ITEMID = #v_PITEMID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(REPLYID), 0) FROM TBL_COMM_ONELINEREPLY WHERE RTRIM(REPLYID) = #v_REPLYID# AND USERID = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(REPLYID), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ONELINEREPLY WHERE RTRIM(REPLYID) = #v_REPLYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_COMM_ONELINEREPLY WHERE RTRIM(REPLYID) = #v_REPLYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND CONTENT LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%'
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBGUEST WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE#

sqlMap.select: SELECT PERMIT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(C_ID) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT MANAGERID FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_POLLMANAGER WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND POLLGROUPNO = #v_MAXNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT PERMIT FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND RTRIM(C_ID) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO WHERE USERID = #v_POLLREGUSER# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND RTRIM(c_id) LIKE '%'|| #v_KEYWORD# ||'%' AND permit IN (1,4) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_MEMBERINFO ON RTRIM(C_MEMBERINFO.userid) = RTRIM(C_CLUBUSER.c_id) WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND C_MEMBERINFO.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE '%'|| #v_KEYWORD# ||'%' AND C_CLUBUSER.permit IN (1,4) AND C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = #tenantID#
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND permit IN (1,4) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT C_NAME FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_CATEGORY WHERE C_CODE = #v_C_CODE# AND C_CAT = #v_C_CAT# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM (SELECT T1.C_CLUBNO , WRITEDATE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WRITEDATE DESC) ROWNUM_ FROM (SELECT DISTINCT C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo, MAX(WRITEDATE) WRITEDATE FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_ClubUser JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club ON C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo = C_Club.C_ClubNo AND C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID = C_Club.Tenant_ID JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_Comm_BoardInfo ON TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.C_ClubNo = C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo AND TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.Tenant_ID = C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_Comm_Item ON TBL_Comm_Item.BoardID = TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.BoardID AND TBL_Comm_Item.Tenant_ID = TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.Tenant_ID WHERE RTRIM(C_ClubUser.C_ID) = #v_USERID# AND C_Club.C_adminConfirm = 'Y' AND C_ClubUser.PERMIT <> 0 AND C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo ) T1 ) T2 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_PSTART# AND #v_PEND#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT T1.C_CLUBNO FROM (SELECT C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo , C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY C_ClubUser.C_Visited DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM EZCOMMUNITY.C_ClubUser JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.C_Club ON C_ClubUser.C_ClubNo = C_Club.C_ClubNo AND C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID = C_Club.Tenant_ID WHERE RTRIM(C_ClubUser.C_ID) = #v_USERID# AND C_Club.C_adminConfirm = 'Y' AND PERMIT <> 0 AND C_ClubUser.Tenant_ID = #tenantID# ) T1 JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_Comm_BoardInfo ON TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.C_ClubNo = T1.C_CLUBNO AND TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.Tenant_ID = T1.Tenant_ID JOIN EZCOMMUNITY.TBL_Comm_Item ON TBL_Comm_Item.BoardID = TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.BoardID AND TBL_Comm_Item.Tenant_ID = TBL_Comm_BoardInfo.Tenant_ID GROUP BY T1.C_CLUBNO, TBL_Comm_Item.WriteDate
